summary: Planned conservative PR inventory classifications from the hydrated cluster preflight artifact. No GitHub mutations are recommended; merge, fix, raise_pr, instant close, and low-signal close are disabled by the job permissions. Five job refs were not present in the hydrated artifact and are scoped needs_human due to missing live state.
